Stability.ai's StableDiffusion3.5 Large, hosted by @fal, is the Stable Diffusion family's most powerful image generation model both in terms of image quality and prompt adherence. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect to select an aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16.
